manifest.description.message: Rich link preview cards for URLs in AI responses  Open Graph hero images, descriptions, and favicons, with offline-friendly disk caching.

card.aria_label.description: Aria label on a link-preview card

settings.description.message: Shows inline preview cards for URLs in AI responses.

settings.enabled.description.message: Show preview cards for URLs found in assistant messages.

settings.show_images.description.message: Render the page's Open Graph or Twitter Card image when available. Turn off to keep cards compact (no images at all).

settings.max_previews.description.message: Limit the number of preview cards shown per message to avoid clutter.

settings.cache.info_html.message: Fetched metadata is cached on disk for up to 7 days so reopening a chat does not re-fetch every URL. Failed fetches are cached briefly so transient errors recover on their own.

settings.cache_stats.description.message: Check how much disk space the link-preview cache is using.

settings.cache_clear.description.message: Wipe the cache. Use this if a link preview looks stale or wrong.

settings.cache_clear.confirm.message: Clear all cached link previews? URLs will be re-fetched the next time they appear.
